info.name: Infer EMR — ABDM HIP/HIU Complete Collection
info.description:
Auto-generated from codebase analysis of Infer EMR backend. Covers all ABDM M1/M2/M3 flows: ABHA Management, Care Context Linking, Consent Workflow, Health Information Transfer, HIP Callbacks, and HIU Callbacks.

Base URL: https://api.inferapp.online
Frontend: https://emr.inferapp.online/emr/

Generated: 2026-06-15

variable.description: ABHA x-token returned after ABHA login/create-verify
ABDM gateway access token (client credentials OAuth2)
ABDM HIP ID registered for Infer EMR
Link reference number from on-init callback
Bearer token sent by ABDM gateway on callbacks (RS256 JWT)

item.name: 🔐 EMR Authentication
item.description: EMR clinic login — required before all /api/emr/* endpoints. Obtain EMR_JWT here.

request.description: POST /api/emr/auth/login — returns JWT stored as EMR_JWT collection variable.

item.name: M1 — ABHA Management
item.description: ABHA creation, login, profile, and card endpoints. Routes: /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/* and /api/emr/abha/*

request.description:
POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/create-otp
Rate-limited: 3 requests per 10 minutes per IP.
Sends OTP to Aadhaar-linked mobile via ABHA service.
Precondition: Valid EMR patient ID, Aadhaar number.
Response: { txnId, message }

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/create-verify
Verifies Aadhaar OTP. On success returns ABHA partial profile + new txnId for mobile OTP.

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/mobile-otp
Rate-limited. Sends OTP to mobile for ABHA mobile verification step.

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/mobile-verify
Verifies mobile OTP. On success ABHA number is created and stored against patient.

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/suggestions
Returns list of available ABHA address suggestions for patient to choose from.

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/set-address
Sets the preferred ABHA address from the suggestions list.

GET /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/card
Downloads ABHA card as PNG image. Requires patient to have a linked ABHA number.

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/verify-otp
Initiates ABHA verification flow for an existing patient. Rate-limited.

POST /api/emr/patients/:id/abha/verify-confirm
Confirms ABHA verification OTP.

POST /api/emr/abha/login-request-otp
Rate-limited. Patient presents ABHA number/address at point of care. Sends OTP for verification.

POST /api/emr/abha/login-verify-otp
Verifies ABHA login OTP. Returns patient ABHA profile and xToken.

item.name: ABHA Login — 3. Link Patient to EMR

request.description:
POST /api/emr/abha/login-link-patient
Links the verified ABHA identity to an existing EMR patient record. Creates entry in abha_mappings table.

item.name: Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 1: Generate OTP

request.description:
POST /api/emr/abha/aadhaar-otp
Standalone Aadhaar OTP — creates new patient from Aadhaar without needing existing EMR patient first.

item.name: Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 2: Verify Aadhaar OTP
Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 3: Mobile OTP
Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 4: Verify Mobile OTP
Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 5: Get Suggestions
Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 6: Set Address
Add Patient via Aadhaar — Step 7: Finalize (Create Patient)

request.description:
POST /api/emr/abha/aadhaar-finalize
Creates EMR patient from Aadhaar-derived ABHA profile. Returns new patient record.

item.name: Add Patient via ABHA Number — Step 1: Request OTP

request.description:
POST /api/emr/abha/request-otp
For adding a patient who already has ABHA. Rate-limited: 3/10min.

item.name: Add Patient via ABHA Number — Step 2: Verify & Create

request.description:
POST /api/emr/abha/verify-create
Verifies OTP and creates/returns EMR patient. Uses resolveOrCreatePatient for deduplication.

item.name: M2 — Care Context Linking (EMR/HIP-side)
item.description: HIP-initiated care context management. Routes: /api/emr/patients/:id/care-contexts and /api/abdm/care-contexts/*

request.description:
POST /api/emr/patients/:id/care-contexts
Registers a care context (clinical visit) for a patient in emr_care_contexts table.
hiType values: OPConsultation | Prescription | DiagnosticReport | ImmunizationRecord | DischargeSummary

DELETE /api/emr/patients/:id/care-contexts/:ctxId
Removes care context from emr_care_contexts.

GET /api/abdm/care-contexts/available
Fetches all care contexts registered at this HIP for the ABHA patient. Used before HIP-initiated linking.

exec: pm.test('Has success or linkToken', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success || j.linkToken || j.message).to.exist; });

request.description:
POST /api/abdm/care-contexts/link
HIP-initiated linking via ABDM v3 HIECM. Calls generateLinkToken() then linkCareContexts().
Stores in linked_care_contexts table.

GET /api/abdm/care-contexts
Returns all care contexts linked to the authenticated user's ABHA from linked_care_contexts table.

DELETE /api/abdm/care-contexts/:contextRef
Unlinks care context from linked_care_contexts table.

POST /api/abdm/care-contexts/discover
Initiates async discovery. Stores in discover_sessions. Poll /care-contexts/discover/:requestId for result.

GET /api/abdm/care-contexts/discover/:requestId
Polls discover_sessions for PENDING → COMPLETED. Returns care contexts when ready.

POST /api/abdm/links/init
Initiates patient-initiated linking. ABDM gateway forwards to HIP's /v0.5/links/link/init which generates OTP.

GET /api/abdm/links/:requestId/status
Polls link_sessions for OTP-ready status.

POST /api/abdm/links/confirm
Submits OTP to confirm patient-initiated link. ABDM gateway forwards to HIP's /v0.5/links/link/confirm.

GET /api/abdm/links/:requestId/confirm-status
Polls for link confirmation completion.

item.name: M2 — Consent Workflow (HIU)
item.description: Consent request creation and management. Routes: /api/emr/consents/* and /api/abdm/consents/*

request.description:
POST /api/emr/consents
Creates ABDM consent request. Calls ABDM gateway /v0.5/consent-requests/init.
Stores in emr_consent_requests.
Purpose codes: CAREMGT | BTG | PUBHLTH | HPAYMT | DSRCH | PATRQT

exec: pm.test('Array or object', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.be.oneOf([null, j]); });

request.description:
GET /api/emr/consents
Returns consent requests for the current clinic from emr_consent_requests.

POST /api/emr/consents/:requestId/respond
Grant or deny a consent request. action: GRANTED | DENIED

POST /api/emr/consents/:requestId/pull-data
Triggers health information fetch from HIP via ABDM gateway. Returns transactionId.

GET /api/emr/consents/health-records
Fetches and decrypts stored health records from health_records table for given requestId/consentId.

item.name: M3 — Health Information (HIU)
item.description: Fetched health records from ABDM. Routes: /api/abdm/health-records

request.description:
GET /api/abdm/health-records
Fetches decrypted FHIR bundles from health_records table. Decrypts using HIU private key (Curve25519/AES-256-GCM). Verifies MD5 checksum per ABDM spec §4.3.2.

item.name: HIP Callbacks — v0.5 (Gateway → EMR)
item.description: ABDM gateway calls these endpoints on the EMR acting as HIP. All require Authorization: Bearer <ABDM RS256 JWT>. These are NOT called by the EMR frontend — they are called by the ABDM gateway.

request.description:
POST /v0.5/care-contexts/discover
ABDM gateway asks HIP to discover care contexts for a patient.
HIP looks up patient by ABHA address/number/mobile, returns matching care contexts.
HIP calls back /v0.5/care-contexts/on-discover with results.
Security: verifyAbdmCallback middleware (RS256 JWT from JWKS).

POST /v0.5/links/link/init
Gateway asks HIP to generate OTP for care context linking.
HIP generates bcrypt-hashed OTP, stores in hip_link_sessions, calls /v0.5/links/link/on-init callback.
SEC-004: crypto.randomInt() OTP. SEC-022: bcrypt hash. SEC-007: 3 attempt lockout.

POST /v0.5/links/link/confirm
Gateway submits OTP to HIP. HIP verifies bcrypt, checks expiry (BLOCKER-1), checks attempts (SEC-007).
On success: validates care contexts exist (BLOCKER-3), calls /v0.5/links/link/on-confirm with retry (BLOCKER-5).

POST /v0.5/health-information/hip/request
Gateway requests HIP to push encrypted FHIR data for consented care contexts.
HIP verifies: consent GRANTED + not expired (SEC-008), UUID format (BLOCKER-4), rate limit (M3-SEC).
Builds FHIR bundles, encrypts with fidelius-cli (BouncyCastle Curve25519), pushes to dataPushUrl.
R2-001: SSRF allowlist for dataPushUrl.

POST /v0.5/consents/hip/notify
Consent Manager notifies HIP that consent was GRANTED/DENIED/REVOKED/EXPIRED.
HIP stores in hip_consent_artifacts. R3-011: validates fields, caps JSON at 64KB.

item.name: HIP Callbacks — v3 (Gateway → EMR)
item.description: ABDM v3 HIP callback paths. Same handlers as v0.5 but at v3 URL scheme. Both with and without /api prefix are registered.

request.description:
POST /v3/hip/patient/care-context/discover (also: /api/v3/hip/patient/care-context/discover)
v3 discovery. Same handler as v0.5.
POST /v3/hip/links/link/init (also: /v3/hip/link/care-context/init, /api/v3/* variants)
POST /v3/hip/links/link/confirm (also: /v3/hip/link/care-context/confirm, /api/v3/* variants)
POST /v3/hip/health-information/request (also: /api/v3/hip/health-information/request)

POST /v3/hip/patient/share/profile (also: /v3/hip/patient/share, /api/v3/* variants)
Patient scans HIP QR code and shares profile. R3-007: token stored as SHA-256 hash.
Creates entry in hip_profile_shares table.

POST /v3/hip/patient/running-token/status (also /api/v3/hip/patient/running-token/status)
Verifies validity of token shown to patient at reception. Calls HIECM v3.

POST /v3/hip/consent/request/notify
Also: /api/v3/hip/consent/request/notify
Also: /v3/consent/request/hip/notify
Also: /api/v3/consent/request/hip/notify
All four paths point to the same handleConsentNotify handler.

item.name: HIU Callbacks — v0.5 (Gateway → EMR)
item.description: ABDM gateway callbacks to EMR acting as HIU (Health Information User). All require ABDM gateway Bearer JWT.

request.description:
POST /v0.5/care-contexts/on-discover
Gateway delivers discovery results. Updates discover_sessions table. Status → COMPLETED.

POST /v0.5/links/link/on-init
HIP informs HIU: OTP generated and sent to patient. Updates link_sessions with linkRefNumber.

POST /v0.5/links/link/on-confirm
HIP confirms link OTP accepted. Stores in linked_care_contexts. Status → LINKED.

POST /v0.5/consent-requests/on-init
Gateway provides ABDM's consentRequest.id for our request. Maps to emr_consent_requests.abdm_request_id.

POST /v0.5/consents/hiu/notify
Gateway notifies HIU of consent GRANTED/DENIED/REVOKED/EXPIRED.
On GRANTED: fetches consent artefact details, calls fetchHealthInfo(), stores transaction_id.

POST /v0.5/health-information/hiu/on-request
HIP acknowledges health data request. sessionStatus: TRANSFERRED | FAILED | PARTIAL.

POST /v0.5/health-information/transfer
HIP pushes encrypted FHIR data. HIU verifies MD5 checksum (M3-FHIR: §4.3.2), decrypts with Curve25519 ECDH AES-256-GCM, stores in health_records table.
Encryption: Weierstrass Curve25519 ECDH + HKDF-SHA256 + AES-256-GCM with XOR nonce.

item.name: HIU Callbacks — v3 (Gateway → EMR)
item.description: v3 HIU callback paths. Same handlers as v0.5.

request.description:
POST /v3/hiu/consent/request/on-init
Also: /api/v3/hiu/consent/request/on-init

POST /v3/hiu/consent/request/notify
Also: /api/v3/hiu/consent/request/notify

POST /v3/hiu/health-information/on-request
Also: /api/v3/hiu/health-information/on-request

item.name: HIU Callbacks — /api/abdm/* (Internal)
item.description: Internal ABDM callback paths mounted under /api/abdm (secondary registration in abdm.routes.js). Some callbacks are registered both here AND at v0.5/* via server.js.

request.description: POST /api/abdm/care-contexts/on-discover — no auth required (internal callback path)
POST /api/abdm/links/link/on-init — no auth (internal callback)
POST /api/abdm/links/link/on-confirm — no auth (internal callback)

POST /api/abdm/consent/notify — no auth
Also: /api/abdm/consent-request/on-status
POST /api/abdm/health-info/push — no auth (internal callback). Stores encrypted FHIR data in health_records.

item.name: ABDM Activity & Diagnostics (EMR)
item.description: HIP activity monitoring and bridge diagnostics. Routes: /api/emr/*

request.description:
GET /api/emr/pending-otps
Returns pending OTP sessions from hip_link_sessions (status=PENDING). Useful for receptionist dashboard.

GET /api/emr/health-requests
Returns M3 health information requests from hip_health_requests table.

GET /api/emr/activity
Overall ABDM activity log for the clinic.

GET /api/emr/abdm/bridge
Fetches bridge URL registration status from ABDM gateway.

POST /api/emr/abdm/bridge/update
Registers/updates HIP callback base URL with ABDM gateway.

GET /api/emr/profile-shares
Returns all QR-scan profile share events from hip_profile_shares table.

POST /api/emr/profile-shares/:id/link-patient
Links a QR walk-in profile share to an existing EMR patient.

PATCH /api/emr/profile-shares/:id/dismiss
Dismisses QR walk-in notification.

item.name: Debug / Test (Remove in Production)
item.description: Debug endpoints. Must be removed or protected before production deployment.

request.description:
GET /api/abdm/debug/token
Tests ABDM client credentials and returns gateway access token.
⚠️ SECURITY RISK: Remove before production or add emrAuth middleware.

GET /api/abdm/debug/bridge
⚠️ SECURITY RISK: Exposes bridge registration details. Protect or remove in production.

GET /api/abdm/debug/hip-sessions
⚠️ SECURITY RISK: Exposes OTP session data including patient identifiers. Remove in production.
